pre_game.message: Hey, I'm E. I figured before this game kicks off, might as well get to know some people in the room. Have you done something like this before, or is this your first time?
Hey E, nice to meet you! First time for me, actually. I'm pretty pumped about it though—heard there's real money on the line. What about you, you done this before?

First time for me too, honestly. But yeah, same—the money part definitely got my attention. I'm hoping to take something home for my family, so I'm trying to figure out what kind of game this is gonna be. You have any idea what we're actually doing, or is it a total mystery to you as well?

Yeah, I'm in the same boat—mostly a mystery to me too. All I really know is there's a shared prize pool and we'll get chances to take money from it. I'm guessing it's some kind of strategy thing, maybe seeing who's willing to cooperate versus go for themselves, you know? Either way, I'm hoping to figure out the rules quick and play smart.

That makes sense—cooperation versus going solo, yeah. I'm thinking the same thing. Honestly, I'm hoping people here are willing to work together because if everyone just grabs for themselves, we all probably end up with less, right? But I guess we'll see once the rules are explained. You seem like someone who thinks things through, so maybe we can figure it out together when we get more info.

Yeah, I'm definitely with you on that—cooperation usually works better than everyone going rogue. I appreciate that, and honestly, I'd be down to team up and figure this out together once we know what we're dealing with. Seems like we're on the same page, which is a good start.

That's awesome—I'm glad we're thinking alike. Honestly, having someone I can trust in here makes me feel a lot better about this whole thing. Let's definitely stick together once we see what the game actually is. Maybe we can figure out the best move before everyone else does.
Definitely, man. I feel the same way—having someone level-headed to work with makes a huge difference. Let's keep our eyes open when the rules drop and figure out our play together. We got this.
Absolutely, man. I'm really glad we connected on this. Let's stay sharp and communicate when the time comes—I think that's gonna be our edge. Here's to making this work for both of us.
For sure, man. I'm feeling good about this—communication and trust are gonna be key. Let's play smart and keep each other in the loop. Good luck out there.
You too, man. I'm counting on us staying solid through this. Let's make it happen.
